description: Transform the static production Docker Compose setup for the 'Quote Service' at /home/ga/projects/quote-service/ into a dynamic development environment with hot-reloading. Modify /home/ga/projects/quote-service/docker-compose.yml to include a bind mount mapping the host's ./src directory to /app in the container and override the service command to run the Flask development server in debug mode (flask run --debug --host=0.0.0.0). The service must be accessible at http://localhost:5000 and reflect changes made to src/app.py immediately without requiring a container rebuild.
